verifying.title: Verifying Payment
verifying.message: Please wait while we verify your payment...

success.title: Payment Successful!
success.appointmentMessage: Your appointment has been confirmed and payment has been processed successfully.
success.insuranceMessage: Your payment has been processed successfully. Please continue with the enrollment process.

redirecting.appointment: Redirecting to appointments page in 3 seconds...
redirecting.insurance: Redirecting back to enrollment in 2 seconds...

failure.title: Payment Failed
failure.message: Unfortunately, your payment could not be processed. This could be due to:

reasons.insufficientBalance: Insufficient balance in your eSewa account

failure.support: Need help? Contact support for assistance.

esewa.name: eSewa
esewa.note: You will be redirected to eSewa to complete the payment securely.

cash.name: Cash
cash.description: Pay in cash at the clinic
cash.note: You will need to pay Rs. {{amount}} in cash when you visit the clinic.
